Transformers: Age of Extinction (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $245,439,076Details
International Box Office $858,614,996
Worldwide Box Office $1,104,054,072
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $29,170,168
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $36,115,929
Total $65,286,097
Further financial details...

Synopsis

An epic battle left a great city torn, but with the world saved. As humanity picks up the pieces, a shadowy group reveals itself in an attempt to control the direction of history… while an ancient, powerful new menace sets Earth in its crosshairs. With help from a new cast of humans, Optimus Prime and the Autobots rise to meet their most fearsome challenge yet as they are swept up in a war of good and evil, ultimately leading to a climactic battle across the world.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$100,038,390 (40.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.45 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:22.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$210,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,233 opening theaters/4,233 max. theaters, 5.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $359,296,376

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 27th, 2014 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
June 27th, 2014 (IMAX) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: June 25th, 2014 (Wide) (Australia)
June 25th, 2014 (Wide) (Taiwan)
June 25th, 2014 (Wide) (Indonesia)
June 25th, 2014 (Wide) (Philippines)
June 25th, 2014 (Wide) (Iceland)
Video Release: September 30th, 2014 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of sci-fi violence and action, language and brief innuendo.
(Rating bulletin 2327, 6/17/2014)
Running Time: 165 minutes
Franchise: Transformers
Cast, crew, or production detail: Intertitle, Live Action Remake, Prologue, Visual Effects, Voiceover/Narration

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

An epic battle left a great city torn, but with the world saved. As humanity picks up the pieces, a shadowy group reveals itself in an attempt to control the direction of history… while an ancient, powerful new menace sets Earth in its crosshairs. With help from a new cast of humans, Optimus Prime and the Autobots rise to meet their most fearsome challenge yet as they are swept up in a war of good and evil, ultimately leading to a climactic battle across the world.
